meaning: n.[动]宝贝科宝贝,(从前南亚和非洲部分地区作货币用的)货贝
examples: Long braids and cowrie shells: Symbolise fertility and wealth.
Other ships. Now, you see, when you fellows were shooting up the Cowrie.
A hundred years ago you could still pay your taxes in Uganda in cowrie shells.
Over the centuries, many things have served the purpose, from beads to cowrie shells to pigs.
Congo's has a catanga cross (a large copper cross), while Equatorial Guinea has a pair of cowrie shells.
